headline: Raymond James Maintains Outperform on JB Hunt Transport Servs, Raises Price Target to $299
summary: Raymond James  analyst Patrick Brown   maintains JB Hunt Transport Servs (NASDAQ:JBHT) with a Outperform and raises the price target from $255 to $299.

headline: Stifel Maintains Hold on JB Hunt Transport Servs, Raises Price Target to $261
